name: openEuler sig-Long SIG

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Long SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The goal of sig-Long is to explore the future development of openEuler by integrating heterogeneous computing power.. The SIG has 59 core members and maintains 24 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-Long SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-Long SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at sig-Long@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-Long SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Long SIG maintains 24 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-Long.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-Long SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Long SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: Binjuan Qin, Jun Tian, Jianhai Luan. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
